src: Implementation of the "the first large-scale multimodal mixture of experts models." from the paper: "Multimodal Contrastive Learning with LIMoE: the Language-Image Mixture of Experts"
ja: 論文「Multimodal Contrastive Learning with LIMoE: the Language-Image Mixture of Experts」における「初の大規模マルチモーダル混合エキスパートモデル」の実装。
